form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 16 at Longchamp October 4 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind Cape Orator carrying 57kg at $13. On debut fifth of 9 at Haydock Park July 3 over 1400m, 6 len behind Protection Act with 60.5kg at $11. Has upside and may pay to follow.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 16 at Longchamp October 4 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind Cape Orator carrying 57kg at $13. On debut fifth of 9 at Haydock Park July 3 over 1400m, 6 len behind Protection Act with 60.5kg at $11. Has upside and may pay to follow.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Toulouse in the LR November 11 over 1600m, 4 len behind Go Man carrying 57kg at $4.20. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 6 len win. Nottingham October 23 over 1680m in the wet defeating Pure Moon carrying 58.5kg at $6. Rates highly here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Toulouse in the LR November 11 over 1600m, 4 len behind Go Man carrying 57kg at $4.20. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 6 len win. Nottingham October 23 over 1680m in the wet defeating Pure Moon carrying 58.5kg at $6. Rates highly here.

form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 16 at Meydan on March 13 over 1800m, 2.75 len behind Blue Trail with 55kg at $7.50. The start before that 6th of 9 at Meydan in the LR JUMEIRAH 2000 GUINEAS on February 28 over 1600m, 8 len behind Title Role with 56kg at $40. Will need to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Returns from a 33-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 16 at Meydan on March 13 over 1800m, 2.75 len behind Blue Trail with 55kg at $7.50. The start before that 6th of 9 at Meydan in the LR JUMEIRAH 2000 GUINEAS on February 28 over 1600m, 8 len behind Title Role with 56kg at $40. Will need to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning by 0.8 len Wolverhampton December 6 over 1900m defeating Affettuoso with 60.5kg at $3. On debut ran last of 8 at Galway September 9 over 1709m, soft track; 29 len behind Piazza San Marco with 59kg at $17. Has ability and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(14.5). Resuming. Not seen since winning by 0.8 len Wolverhampton December 6 over 1900m defeating Affettuoso with 60.5kg at $3. On debut ran last of 8 at Galway September 9 over 1709m, soft track; 29 len behind Piazza San Marco with 59kg at $17. Has ability and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd in a small field at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 2200m, 2.75 len behind Pursuit Of Love with 60.5kg at $4.30. Second run from a spell won by 1.5 len at Doncaster March 28 over 2000m defeating Sailor Song with 60.5kg at $8.50. Key runner who is expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Third-up today. Resuming 2nd in a small field at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 2200m, 2.75 len behind Pursuit Of Love with 60.5kg at $4.30. Second run from a spell won by 1.5 len at Doncaster March 28 over 2000m defeating Sailor Song with 60.5kg at $8.50. Key runner who is expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign faded in the straight 9th of 15 at this track on October 31 over 1400m, 11 len behind Yazin with 58kg at $10. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 11 at Sandown Park on July 24 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Publish carrying 60.5kg at $15. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Back after a long spell. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 11 at Sandown Park on July 24 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Publish carrying 60.5kg at $15. Not keen.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Wolverhampton November 8 over 1700m, a neck behind Sahara King carrying 60.5kg at $6. On debut fifth of 7 at this track September 25 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Maltese Cross carrying 58kg at $29. Has upside and may pay to follow.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(15). Resuming after a five months break. On debut fifth of 7 at this track September 25 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Maltese Cross carrying 58kg at $29. Has upside and may pay to follow.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 8 at Wolverhampton on February 23 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Crown Relic carrying 56.5kg at $1.70. Second-up 2nd in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 23 over 1700m, 0.5 len behind Laureate Crown carrying 58kg at $1.70. Won't be far away with a repeat of that latest performance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 8 at Wolverhampton on February 23 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Crown Relic carrying 56.5kg at $1.70. form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on March 20 over 2000m, 18 len behind A Taste Of Glory carrying 58kg at $15. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather on September 24 over 1600m, 8 len behind See Blue with 58kg at $301. Still early in the prep and might need more time.
